  1. pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model
  2. IncorrectNoOfRailsException

Uses of Class
pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.IncorrectNoOfRailsException

Packages that use IncorrectNoOfRailsException
Package
Description
pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller
Contains ControllerServlet and HistoryServlet HttpServlet classes.
pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model
Contains Model class, IncorrectNoOfRailsException exception class, LogEntry record, ExceptionLambda functional interface, ModelContextListener implementing the ServletContextListener interface, and CipherParams, ResultHistory database models.

    Model.decode()
    Method decoding the text according to the number of rails.
